## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] New principle
- [ ] Modification to an existing principle
- [ ] Reordering of principles
- [ ] Workflow or process change
- [ ] Documentation / README only
- [ ] Bug fix (incorrect behavior)
- [ ] Other: <!-- describe -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Changes are limited to `SKILL.md`, `README.md`, or documentation files
- [ ] If adding or modifying a principle: at least two independent sources are cited in the PR description or in the file
- [ ] If modifying a principle: explanation of what was wrong with the original wording is included
- [ ] The principle still applies across all LLMs (not model-specific or version-specific)
- [ ] No buzzwords added ("blazing fast", "powerful", "seamless", etc.)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated under `[Unreleased]`
